commitResults.messageTitle: Add Virtual File System (VFS) core implementation (#8)
commitResults.messageBody:
Implements the foundational VFS layer for LinuxLingo shell simulation:

- FileNode.java: Abstract base class representing a generic filesystem node,
  with support for name, parent reference, permissions, and absolute path resolution.
- Directory.java: Concrete directory node with child node management
  (add, remove, lookup by name).
- RegularFile.java: Concrete regular file node holding text content.
- Permission.java: Unix-style permission model (rwxrwxrwx string parsing,
  octal representation, read/write/execute checks for owner/group/others).
- VfsException.java: Unchecked exception for VFS-specific error signalling.
- VirtualFileSystem.java: Facade providing full path resolution, directory
  listing, file/directory creation and deletion, copy, move, working-directory
  management, and a default in-memory filesystem tree (/home/user, /tmp, /etc).

Resolves #8

- Fix checkstyle violations:
  - Permission.java: Expand one-liner accessors and compact switch blocks into
    properly braced multi-line statements; extract applyPermissionOp helper
  - LinuxLingo.java: Add braces to single-line if construct
  - ResourceExtractor.java: Fix array initializer indentation
  - QuestionBank.java: Reorder overloaded getQuestions() methods to be adjacent
- Make startup-path stubs (ResourceExtractor.extractIfNeeded, QuestionBank.load)
  no-op instead of throwing UnsupportedOperationException, so the app boots
  cleanly before those stubs are implemented

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix QuestionParser to handle escaped pipe `\\|` in FITB answers (#51)
commitResults.messageBody: Use negative lookbehind regex so `\\|` is not treated as an answer separator in FITB questions. Add `.replace(\"\\\\|\", \"|\")` to unescape pipe characters in accepted answers.\n\nCloses #45

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix VfsSerializer deserialization of files with empty content (#52)
commitResults.messageBody: After trimming, re-append a trailing space when the line ends with `|` (indicating empty content), so `split(\" \\\\| \", 4)` produces the expected 4 parts.\n\nCloses #46

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix GrepCommand stdin filtering and add -v invert match flag (#53)
commitResults.messageBody: Fix stdin being passed through without filtering by assigning it to the content variable. Add `-v` (invert match) flag support with flag parsing and inversion logic.\n\nCloses #44

- CdCommandTest (10 tests): home, absolute, swap, parent, error handling
- LsCommandTest (9 tests): dir listing, hidden files, long format, flags
- BuiltinCommandTest (5 tests): help, clear, reset

Closes #48

commitResults.messageBody:

- QuestionParserTest (14 tests): MCQ, FITB, PRAC parsing, escaped pipe, malformed lines

Closes #49

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix command bugs in shell commands (#113)
commitResults.messageBody:
- CatCommand: Fix cat -n not working with stdin piped input; improve error message
- ChmodCommand: Fix symbolic mode regex for comma-separated modes and optional user class
- CpCommand: Support multi-source copy (cp file1 file2 dir/)
- MvCommand: Support multi-source move (mv file1 file2 dir/)
- WhichCommand: Fix output format to command: /bin/command style
- FindCommand: Make path argument optional (default to .); return success for empty result
- ShellParser: Fix single-quote handling; add backslash escaping outside quotes
- DateCommand: Convert Linux strftime format specifiers to Java DateTimeFormatter patterns

commitResults.messageTitle: Implement diff and tee commands (#115)
commitResults.messageBody:
- DiffCommand: Compare two files line by line with unified-diff-like output
- TeeCommand: Read from stdin and write to files with -a append flag
- Register tee command in CommandRegistry

commitResults.messageTitle: Enhance existing commands with new flags and multi-file support (#109)
commitResults.messageBody:
- EchoCommand: Add -e flag to interpret escape sequences
- GrepCommand: Add -l flag for listing filenames only; multi-file search with filename prefixes
- HeadCommand: Add legacy -N syntax support (e.g. head -5 file)
- TailCommand: Enhance with multi-file headers and improved option handling
- WcCommand: Enhance with multi-file totals and individual flag support
- LsCommand: Enhance with additional listing options and improved formatting
- ShellSession: Add enhancements for command execution pipeline

commitResults.messageTitle: Improve JavaDoc and comments across core packages

Improved JavaDoc comments for:

- cli: MainParser, Ui
- storage: Storage, StorageException
- LinuxLingo (main entry point)

All JavaDoc now follows the project coding standard:

commitResults.messageBody: Improve JavaDoc and comments across core packages

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix bugs #133-#140: crash fixes, operator semantics, error handling
commitResults.messageBody:
Bug fixes:
- #133: Input redirect from non-existent file no longer crashes (try-catch in runPlan)
- #134: Output redirect to read-only file no longer crashes (try-catch in runPlan)
- #135: && and || now use continue instead of break, so subsequent ; segments run
- #136: Intermediate segment stdout is accumulated and returned, not discarded
- #137: Duplicate stderr printing removed from handleExec() (already printed in runPlan)
- #138: Moving a directory into itself is now detected and rejected
- #139: Dangling pipe/redirect operators now produce syntax error messages
- #140: exec -e without a command now shows proper error instead of treating -e as command

Test updates:
- Updated ShellParserTest to expect IllegalArgumentException for dangling operators
- Updated ShellSessionTest to expect accumulated stdout from chained commands

commitResults.messageTitle: Merge pull request #141 from Michael-wzl/fix/bug-fixes-133-to-140
commitResults.messageBody: Fix bugs #133–#140: Crash fixes, operator semantics, and error handling

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix bugs #142-#150: Shell session, command, and parser fixes (#153)
commitResults.messageBody:
Bug fixes from stress testing:
- #142: Suppress Logger WARNING leak to stderr
- #143: ls now handles file targets directly
- #144: Empty quoted arguments preserved via wasQuoted tracking
- #145: Combined flag expansion limit raised, isKnownLongOption guard added
- #146: pwd detects dangling CWD via vfs.exists() check
- #147: Stderr/stdout accumulated separately, callers print stderr before stdout
- #148: Fixed newline separator logic for multi-segment output
- #149: Removed duplicate ui.println() from runPlan()
- #150: wc -l uses POSIX newline counting

Fixes #142, #143, #144, #145, #146, #147, #148, #149, #150

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: resolve multiple shell bugs (#155-#166)
commitResults.messageBody:
Bug fixes:
- #156: date +%Z crash — use ZonedDateTime instead of LocalDateTime
- #158: date garbled specifiers — handle %s (epoch), quote unknown specifiers
- #159: multi-word alias fails — split alias value into command + args
- #160: ls|wc -l off-by-one — normalize piped content with trailing newline
- #161: stderr/stdout ordering — use ordered output buffer for display
- #162: extra blank lines — smart newline insertion, print vs println
- #165: cp/mv to self — detect same-file via normalized path comparison

Already fixed (verified):
- #155: redirect to directory — VFS.writeFile already throws
- #157: grep invalid regex — already caught in -E mode
- #163: redirect chmod bypass — VFS.createFile checks parent perms
- #164: pwd stale CWD — PwdCommand already validates
- #166: save unsafe names — SaveCommand already validates with regex

Updated integration tests to match corrected wc -l pipe behavior.

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: Update Michael_TestReport.md — mark all PR #167 fixes as FIXED
commitResults.messageBody:
Update bug statuses and test result entries for all 12 issues resolved by PR #167:
- Bug 22/Issue #156: date +%Z timezone crash → FIXED (ZonedDateTime)
- Bug 23/Issue #158: date +%s garbled output → FIXED (Instant.getEpochSecond)
- Bug 24/Issue #159: multi-word alias not re-tokenized → FIXED (resolveAlias split)
- Bug 25/Issue #160: wc -l off-by-one in pipes → FIXED (pipe normalization)
- Bug 26/Issue #157: grep regex crash → FIXED (PatternSyntaxException caught)
- Bug 27/Issue #155: redirect to directory → FIXED (VFS writeFile check)
- Bug 28/Issue #165: cp/mv file to itself → FIXED (getAbsolutePath comparison)
- Bug 29/Issue #163: chmod bypass on redirect → FIXED (canOwnerWrite check)
- Bug 30/Issue #166: save accepts unsafe names → FIXED (regex validation)
- Bug 8/Issue #164: pwd stale CWD → FIXED (VFS node existence check)
- Bug 14/Issue #162: extra blank lines in chained output → FIXED (appendToOrderedOutput)
- Bug 16/Issue #161: stderr/stdout ordering inverted → FIXED (orderedOutput buffer)

Each test entry updated with: new Result (PASS/Fixed), actual output after fix,
and brief description of the fix applied. Bug summary table rows struck through
and marked FIXED (PR #167).

commitResults.messageTitle: Merge upstream/master: resolve ShellSession conflicts
commitResults.messageBody:
Integrate upstream's refactored helper methods (shouldSkipSegment,
precedingOperatorIsNotPipe, resolveStdin, prepareArgs, resolveCommand,
applyOutputRedirect) with PR bug fixes:
- Ordered output buffer for correct stdout/stderr interleaving (#161, #162)
- Multi-word alias resolution in prepareArgs/resolveCommand (#159)
- Pipe trailing newline normalization (#160)
- appendToOrderedOutput/appendToAccumulator helpers for display ordering

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: Resolve multiple shell bugs (#155-#166)
commitResults.messageBody: Fix 7 bugs: date timezone crash (#156), date %s output (#158), multi-word alias (#159), wc -l pipe count (#160), stdout/stderr ordering (#161), extra blank lines (#162), cp/mv same-file (#165). Verified 5 already-fixed issues (#155, #157, #163, #164, #166).

commitResults.messageTitle: refactor: clean up dead code and fix minor code quality issues
commitResults.messageBody:
- ShellCompleter: remove stale TODO comments for already-implemented methods
- ShellLineReader: remove stale TODO comments; use lambda in LOGGER.warning to avoid eager string concatenation
- ShellParser: remove unused private overloads buildSegment() and flushCurrentToken()
- ShellSession: remove unused EXIT_CODE_GENERAL_ERROR constant; remove unused private overloads handleCommandNotFound() and resolveAlias(); use lambda in LOGGER.warning calls; simplify shouldSkipSegment() with a single boolean return expression; reorder imports alphabetically
- GrepCommand: guard regex matching with null-check on patternRegex to prevent NPE

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix all PE-D true positive bugs
commitResults.messageBody:
- Fix #184: Unicode input no longer crashes the program (null-safe JLine read)
- Fix #195, #175: cp -r detects ancestor-to-descendant copy and prevents it
- Fix #188: rm prevents deleting current working directory or its ancestors
- Fix #180, #197: VFS validates file names (rejects '/', empty, too long)
- Fix #187: Enforce file name length (255) and path depth (50) limits
- Fix #179, #178: Add '--' end-of-options support to all flag-parsing commands
- Fix #174: ShellParser preserves backslash in double quotes for echo -e
- Fix #186, #189: grep -c always outputs count including 0
- Fix #177: Remove duplicate 'cp:' prefix in error messages
- Fix #182: Fix 'arguemnts' typo to 'arguments' in HistoryCommand
- Fix #183: HistoryCommand reports 'invalid option' for bad flags
- Fix #181: HistoryCommand reports 'out of range' for large numbers
- Fix #192: AliasCommand silently ignores extra args per UG spec
- Fix #176: Configure JLine terminal with UTF-8 encoding
- Fix #191: Warn when control-flow keywords appear as redirect args
- Fix #173: Add 'abort' command to exit exam early with partial score
